news.title:
Citi maintains 'Buy' on HAL, sets price target of ₹5,560, 30% upside.
HAL-GE Aerospace agree on F414 jet engine co-production, boosting Tejas Mk2, AMCA Mk1 programs.
news.summary:
Citi maintains 'Buy' on HAL, sets price target of ₹5,560, 30% upside.
HAL-GE Aerospace agree on F414 jet engine co-production, boosting Tejas Mk2, AMCA Mk1 programs.

news.title:
Citi retains Buy on HAL with ₹5,560 target, citing F414 engine co-production deal closure by Dec-26/Mar-27.
Upside expected from Tejas Mk2 (100+ aircraft) and AMCA Mk1 demand; execution timelines pose risk.
news.summary:
Citi retains Buy on HAL with ₹5,560 target, citing F414 engine co-production deal closure by Dec-26/Mar-27.
Upside expected from Tejas Mk2 (100+ aircraft) and AMCA Mk1 demand; execution timelines pose risk.

news.title:
GE Aerospace, HAL agree on co-producing F414 fighter jet engines in India.
The deal signifies a shift of advanced US military tech to India.
news.summary:

news.title:
Experts recommend holding Ather Energy, HDFC Bank; buying Vikram Solar, Balu Forge in staggered manner.

news.title:
India's Rs 2.38 lakh crore defence push benefits Bharat Electronics (BEL), Hindustan Aeronautics (HAL), and Bharat Dynamics (BDL). BEL leads in air defence tech and radar systems.
HAL focuses on Su-30 engine overhauls and transport aircraft, while BDL excels in missile systems and anti-tank weapons with strong order pipelines.
news.summary:
India's Rs 2.38 lakh crore defence push benefits Bharat Electronics (BEL), Hindustan Aeronautics (HAL), and Bharat Dynamics (BDL). BEL leads in air defence tech and radar systems.
HAL focuses on Su-30 engine overhauls and transport aircraft, while BDL excels in missile systems and anti-tank weapons with strong order pipelines.

news.title:
JM Financial initiates coverage on Hindustan Aeronautics (HAL) with 'Buy', setting a target price of ₹4,875, indicating over 20% upside.
HAL's growth driven by IAF fleet upgrades, air defence capex, and strong manufacturing revenue CAGR of 50% during FY26-28.
news.summary:
JM Financial initiates coverage on Hindustan Aeronautics (HAL) with 'Buy', setting a target price of ₹4,875, indicating over 20% upside.
HAL's growth driven by IAF fleet upgrades, air defence capex, and strong manufacturing revenue CAGR of 50% during FY26-28.

news.title: HAL and Cochin Shipyard rally as markets turn choppy, Nifty slips below 23,850.
news.summary: HAL and Cochin Shipyard rally as markets turn choppy, Nifty slips below 23,850.

news.title:
Hindustan Aeronautics Ltd (HAL) faces delays in GE engine supplies, impacting LCA Tejas deliveries and FY26 revenue, which missed estimates by 7%.
HAL's robust ₹2.54 trillion order book offers long-term visibility, but supply-chain issues pose risks, keeping the stock range-bound near term despite positive sentiment.
news.summary:
Hindustan Aeronautics Ltd (HAL) faces delays in GE engine supplies, impacting LCA Tejas deliveries and FY26 revenue, which missed estimates by 7%.
HAL's robust ₹2.54 trillion order book offers long-term visibility, but supply-chain issues pose risks, keeping the stock range-bound near term despite positive sentiment.

news.title:
Nomura reaffirms 'Buy' on six stocks, including Hindustan Aeronautics, Adani Ports, Dabur, Marico, FSN E-Commerce, and Godrej Consumer, with 24-62% upside.
Key drivers include strong order pipelines, demand recovery, margin resilience, and diversified business operations across sectors.
news.summary:
Nomura reaffirms 'Buy' on six stocks, including Hindustan Aeronautics, Adani Ports, Dabur, Marico, FSN E-Commerce, and Godrej Consumer, with 24-62% upside.
Key drivers include strong order pipelines, demand recovery, margin resilience, and diversified business operations across sectors.

news.title:
Analysts discuss buy, hold, and sell strategies for Kalyan Jewellers, JSW Energy, RVNL, Tata Motors CV, Hindustan Copper, and HAL.
Recommendations include bullish targets for Kalyan Jewellers, JSW Energy, and Hindustan Copper, while advising caution for HAL and Max Healthcare.

news.title:
Hindustan Aeronautics announced Dr. S D Premkumar's resignation as Independent Director.
The resignation was communicated via email dated April 5, 2026.

news.title:
India plans 100 airports, 200 helipads to boost regional connectivity, benefiting stocks like HAL, GMR, and others.
Key beneficiaries include HAL, GMR Airports, IndiGo, L&T, and Adani Enterprises due to growth in aviation infrastructure.
news.summary:
India plans 100 airports, 200 helipads to boost regional connectivity, benefiting stocks like HAL, GMR, and others.

news.title:
HAL, BEL, and other defence stocks are set to benefit from geopolitical tensions and India's rising defence deals with Germany, France, and Israel.
HAL's revenue rose 10.7% YoY; BEL's surged 23.7% YoY, driven by strong order books. Defence budget hike to 15.2% in FY26-27 boosts growth.
news.summary:
HAL, BEL, and other defence stocks are set to benefit from geopolitical tensions and India's rising defence deals with Germany, France, and Israel.
HAL's revenue rose 10.7% YoY; BEL's surged 23.7% YoY, driven by strong order books. Defence budget hike to 15.2% in FY26-27 boosts growth.

news.title:
HAL penalizes GE for delays in F404 engine deliveries for Tejas Mk1A jets.
HAL expects six jets ready by April and 20 engines by 2H CY26 per GE's assurance.
news.summary:
